source_metadata.title: 2025/09/10 - MA
source_metadata.description:
Wednesday 10 September 2025 | Māori Affairs Committee 

Briefing on Treaty settlement legislation and Report of the Controller and Auditor-General, How public organisations are fulfilling Treaty settlements   

Hearing of evidence
Submitter list:
Department of Conservation 
- Sheridan Smith, Deputy Director-General Treaty Relationships 
- Peter Galvin, Acting Deputy Director-General Policy 
- Huia Forbes, Kaihautu Treaty Relationships Advice and Oversight and Acting Director Treaty Negotiations and Land 
- Jos Fryer, Principal Treaty Relationships Advisor
